title: Faceted Browser: floating-point number format issues
description:
When the FCT service is accessed via the "describe" verb (http://:/describe/?url=), datatype properties of the http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#double type are truncated and shown as integers. For example:
ChEMBL Activity Entity Standard Value | 13(xsd:double)
GOSTAR Micromolar value | 0(xsd:double)
The actual values in the above example are 13.6 and 0.0136, respectively, which can be confirmed by running the following "sparql describe" query from the isql command line:
sparql describe https://www.gostardb.com/gostar/activity/ACT_ID1893144
...
https://www.gostardb.com/gostar/activity/ACT_ID1893144 http://rdf.ebi.ac.uk/terms/chembl#standardValue  13.6
https://www.gostardb.com/gostar/activity/ACT_ID1893144 https://www.gostardb.com/gostar/gostarOntology#microMolarValue  0.0136
...
OpenLink Virtuoso  Server
Version 07.20.3217-threads for Win64 as of Apr 25 2016
Started on: 2017-09-25 14:01 GMT-4
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_floating_points (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_floating_points (id, value) VALUES (1, 13.6), (2, 0.0136), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, value, CAST(value AS SIGNED) AS truncated_value FROM test_floating_points WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_floating_points SET value = 15.75 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_floating_points WHERE value < 1.0 OR value > 10.0;
key_bug_features: Truncation of floating-point numbers to integers
